title: To The Earl Of Westmoreland.
content:
When my date's done, and my grey age must die,
    Nurse up, great lord, this my posterity:
    Weak though it be, long may it grow and stand,
    Shored up by you, brave Earl of Westmoreland.
meaning:
"To The Earl Of Westmoreland." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
